params.SpellDescription: Spells you cast from your graveyard this turn cost {2} less to cast. Activate only if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Spells you cast from your graveyard this turn cost {2} less to cast. Activate only if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard.

params.TriggerDescription: Whenever CARDNAME or another Rat you control enters, conjure a card named Think Twice into your graveyard.
